title: Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
